title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.360 - Effect of confirmation of report on parties claiming adversely
text:
528.360.  Effect of confirmation of report on parties claiming adversely. — When, in any report of commissioners, setting off a parcel, the subject of the adverse claims of different parties shall be confirmed, it shall be a bar to the claims of such parties to the residue of the lands, or the moneys arising thereon, if sold, and shall vest the part allotted subject to the controversy, in the party who shall have title to the share or shares represented in the allotment.
(RSMo 1939 § 1744) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1580; 1919 § 2028; 1909 § 2592
